mapper.sql: alevel_import_batch_id, batch_code, batch_name, import_source_type, origin_name, source_root_path, storage_root_path, total_file_count, resolved_pdf_count, success_count, failure_count, bundle_count, import_status, progress_percent, progress_message, operator_id, result_json, error_message, started_at, finished_at, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM alevel_import_batch WHERE alevel_import_batch_id = #{batchId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM alevel_import_batch WHERE batch_code = #{batchCode} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alevel_import_batch ( batch_code, batch_name, import_source_type, origin_name, source_root_path, storage_root_path, total_file_count, resolved_pdf_count, success_count, failure_count, bundle_count, import_status, progress_percent, progress_message, operator_id, result_json, error_message, started_at, finished_at, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{batchCode}, #{batchName}, #{importSourceType}, #{originName}, #{sourceRootPath}, #{storageRootPath}, #{totalFileCount}, #{resolvedPdfCount}, #{successCount}, #{failureCount}, #{bundleCount}, #{importStatus}, #{progressPercent}, #{progressMessage}, #{operatorId}, #{resultJson}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleteFlag} )
mapper.update: UPDATE alevel_import_batch SET batch_name = #{batchName}, import_source_type = #{importSourceType}, origin_name = #{originName}, source_root_path = #{sourceRootPath}, storage_root_path = #{storageRootPath}, total_file_count = #{totalFileCount}, resolved_pdf_count = #{resolvedPdfCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, failure_count = #{failureCount}, bundle_count = #{bundleCount}, import_status = #{importStatus}, progress_percent = #{progressPercent}, progress_message = #{progressMessage}, operator_id = #{operatorId}, result_json = #{resultJson}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, started_at = #{startedAt}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE alevel_import_batch_id = #{alevelImportBatchId}
